label: Amplitude
description: Query Amplitude product analytics data including events, funnels, and retention cohorts via the Amplitude API.

form.title: Connect Amplitude
form.subtitle: Paste your Amplitude project API key and secret key to start pulling events, funnels, and retention data.

methods.label: API Key & Secret Key
methods.description: Paste your Amplitude project API key and secret key. Found in your project settings — takes 30 seconds and no OAuth setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Find your Amplitude API Key and Secret Key

1. Log in to [Amplitude](https://app.amplitude.com) and open the project you want to connect.
2. Click **Settings** in the left sidebar, then select **Projects** under the Organization section.
3. Click the name of your project.
4. On the **General** tab you will see **API Key** and **Secret Key** listed directly.
5. Copy both values and paste them into the fields below.
6. Select your data residency **Region** — choose **EU** if your Amplitude organization is hosted in the EU data center (app.eu.amplitude.com), otherwise leave it as **US**.

## Notes

- The secret key is sensitive — treat it like a password and do not share it.
- API keys are scoped to a single project; repeat this process for each project you want to connect.
- If you need to rotate credentials, generate new ones in project settings and update them here.
- Read [Amplitude's authentication docs](https://www.docs.developers.amplitude.com/analytics/apis/http-v2-api/#authentication) for more detail.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found in Amplitude → Settings → Projects → [your project] → General tab.

fields.name: secret_key
fields.label: Secret Key
fields.description: Paired with the API key. Treat this like a password — it grants full read access to your project data.

fields.name: region
fields.label: Data Residency Region
fields.description: Select US unless your Amplitude organization is hosted on the EU data center (app.eu.amplitude.com).
